Package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.exception.types

package io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.exception.types
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.github.michaelcirkl.ubsa.client.exception
     
  • Exception Classes
    Class
    Description
    AccessDeniedException
    Thrown when the request is authenticated but not authorized to access the target resource.
    AuthenticationFailedException
    Thrown when the request could not be authenticated.
    BlobNotFoundException
    Thrown when the requested blob/object does not exist.
    BucketAlreadyExistsException
    Thrown when creating a bucket/container that already exists.
    BucketNotFoundException
    Thrown when the requested bucket/container does not exist.
    ConditionFailedException
    Thrown when a conditional request fails.
    InvalidRequestException
    Thrown when the request is malformed or contains invalid parameters for the target provider.
    RequestTimeoutException
    Thrown when the provider times out while processing the request.
